name: PRISMA 2020
description: Preferred Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews and Meta-Analyses 2020.

items.title: Title
items.description: Identify the report as a systematic review.

items.title: Abstract
items.description: See the PRISMA 2020 for Abstracts checklist.

items.title: Rationale
items.description: Describe the rationale for the review in the context of existing knowledge.

items.title: Objectives
items.description: Provide an explicit statement of the objective(s) or question(s) the review addresses.

items.title: Eligibility criteria
items.description: Specify the inclusion and exclusion criteria for the review and how studies were grouped for the syntheses.

items.title: Information sources
items.description: Specify all databases, registers, websites, organisations, reference lists, and other sources searched or consulted; specify the date when each source was last searched.

items.title: Search strategy
items.description: Present the full search strategies for all databases, registers, and websites, including any filters and limits used.

items.title: Selection process
items.description: Specify the methods used to decide whether a study met the inclusion criteria, including how many reviewers screened each record and each retrieved report, whether they worked independently, and any automation tools used.

items.title: Data collection process
items.description: Specify the methods used to collect data from reports, including how many reviewers collected data from each report, whether they worked independently, and any automation tools used.

items.title: Data items
items.description: List and define all outcomes for which data were sought; list and define all other variables for which data were sought (e.g. PICO).

items.title: Study risk of bias assessment
items.description: Specify the methods used to assess risk of bias in the included studies, including details of the tool(s) used, how many reviewers assessed each study, and whether they worked independently.

items.title: Effect measures
items.description: Specify for each outcome the effect measure(s) used in the synthesis or presentation of results.

items.title: Synthesis methods
items.description: Describe processes used to decide which studies were eligible for each synthesis and methods used to prepare data, tabulate, present, and synthesise results (including any meta-analyses, heterogeneity assessment, subgroup or sensitivity analyses).

items.title: Reporting bias assessment
items.description: Describe any methods used to assess risk of bias due to missing results in a synthesis (arising from reporting biases).

items.title: Certainty assessment
items.description: Describe any methods used to assess certainty (or confidence) in the body of evidence for an outcome.

items.title: Study selection
items.description: Describe the results of the search and selection process from the number of records identified to the number of studies included, ideally using a flow diagram; cite studies that might appear to meet the inclusion criteria but were excluded with reasons.

items.title: Study characteristics
items.description: Cite each included study and present its characteristics.

items.title: Risk of bias in studies
items.description: Present assessments of risk of bias for each included study.

items.title: Results of individual studies
items.description: For all outcomes, present for each study: summary statistics for each group and an effect estimate with its precision (e.g. 95% CI), ideally using structured tables or plots.

items.title: Results of syntheses
items.description: Present results of all statistical syntheses, including heterogeneity, subgroup analyses, sensitivity analyses, and assessment of robustness.

items.title: Reporting biases
items.description: Present assessments of risk of bias due to missing results (arising from reporting biases) for each synthesis assessed.

items.title: Certainty of evidence
items.description: Present assessments of certainty (or confidence) in the body of evidence for each outcome assessed.

items.title: Discussion
items.description: Provide a general interpretation of the results in the context of other evidence; discuss any limitations of the evidence included in the review and limitations of the review processes used; discuss implications of the results for practice, policy, and future research.

items.title: Registration and protocol
items.description: Provide registration information for the review, including the register name and registration number, or state that the review was not registered; indicate where the review protocol can be accessed, or state it was not prepared; describe and explain any amendments.

items.title: Support
items.description: Describe sources of financial or non-financial support for the review, and the role of the funders or sponsors in the review.

items.title: Competing interests
items.description: Declare any competing interests of review authors.

items.title: Availability of data, code, and other materials
items.description: Report which of the following are publicly available and where they can be found: template data collection forms; data extracted from included studies; data used for analyses; analytic code; any other materials used in the review.
